name: Simple Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour olive oil into a medium-size heavy frying pan over medium heat.
2. Wash and trim the green onions and add them to the pan.
3. Season the salmon with salt and pepper and add it to the pan.
4. Fry until the salmon is crusty and cooked through (about 10 minutes depending on thickness) but not overdone. Check for doneness by inserting a small knife into the center; the flesh will have changed from dark pink to pale pink.
5. Sprinkle with dill if using.
6. Transfer to a plate and serve with lemon wedge.
Makes one serving.
